overall.description: First-person game footage of a character walking through a dense forest at night, illuminated by a handheld torch. The camera moves steadily along a narrow dirt path surrounded by thick vegetation and tall trees, creating an atmospheric exploration scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail with thick undergrowth

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the forest path, holding a lit torch to illuminate the narrow trail ahead

entered.detail: handheld flame casting warm orange light on the path and vegetation
tall dark tree trunks forming the forest canopy
thick bushes and ferns lining both sides of the narrow trail
narrow winding dirt trail through the forest floor

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking through a dense forest at night. A lit torch in the left foreground illuminates the narrow dirt path ahead, revealing thick undergrowth and tall trees surrounding the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest interior with limited visibility

events.description: torch is lowered or moved out of frame, significantly reducing illumination

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward along the forest path with the torch no longer visible in the frame

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking deeper into the forest without the torch visible in the frame, resulting in darker visibility. The path remains surrounded by dense vegetation and tall trees, maintaining the enclosed forest atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest path approaching large tree obstacle

agents.ego_description: approaching a large tree trunk that appears directly ahead on the path

entered.detail: thick tree trunk emerging from the darkness directly ahead on the path

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the path continuing through the dense forest, with a large tree trunk becoming visible directly ahead in the center of the trail. The surroundings remain dark and enclosed by thick vegetation as the camera approaches the tree obstacle.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dense nocturnal forest that shifts from a guided trek to a more claustrophobic encounter. It begins with a lit torch in the left foreground illuminating a narrow dirt path and the thick undergrowth of surrounding tall trees. As the camera moves deeper into the woods, the torch disappears from the frame, causing the visibility to drop and the atmosphere to become significantly darker. The scene then continues along the enclosed trail through the oppressive vegetation before finally turning toward a large tree trunk that emerges as a direct obstacle in the center of the path.
